description_long: This object is a vintage-style computer monitor with an integrated control panel, reminiscent of early terminal or kiosk designs. The front features a large, deep-set rectangular screen surrounded by a thick, matte bezel, with a control panel to the right that includes a numeric keypad, several buttons, and indicator lights. The lower front section also has two vertical slots and a pair of protruding levers or sliders. The body is constructed from a light gray, hard plastic or metal shell, with visible ventilation grilles and a rear power cord. The rear panel includes a lockable compartment and a prominent power switch, while the sides are mostly plain except for a few ventilation slots and a small port panel. The overall form is boxy and robust, suitable for public or industrial environments.
description: A robust, vintage computer monitor with a thick bezel, integrated control panel, and a sturdy, boxy shell in light gray. Features include a numeric keypad, indicator lights, and rear power access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large screen, thick bezel, integrated control panel with keypad and buttons, and two vertical slots with levers.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the angled profile, ventilation slots, and a small port panel near the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the lockable compartment, power switch, and the attached power cord.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain surface with a ventilation slot and the extended power cord.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and rectangular with a matte finish, made of light gray plastic. It has sharp corners and no decorative elements, providing a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by an integrated, box-like base that is part of the main housing, with no visible separate stand or adjustability features. The base is wide and flat, matching the main body material.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons and a numeric keypad are located on the lower right section of the front panel, grouped together for easy access. Two levers or sliders are positioned on the lower left.
attribute_port_visibility: A small port panel is visible on the left side near the base, with several ports apparent. No ports are visible on the front or rear.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the upper front bezel, slightly left of center, and another logo is present on the rear panel. Both are subtle and monochrome.
